ops.text: Item 2 SHIPPED: 81b123bba9df1141daeb2f6ab08e8fb733152469 on origin main — "judge: hoist static triage/audit/refine prompt blocks into a cached system prompt via cached_judge; PROMPT_VERSION 6->7, AUDIT_VERSION 5->6, REFINE 3->4". All four CI workflows green (CI, Documentation, Guides, cc-notes). Port notes (cc-notes c71f226d): cached_judge validated against cc-transcript 14.6.1/spawnllm 0.6.2; provider_configs inlined into the RunSpec call for Linux-ty invariance; the byte fixture build_prompt_2_0.txt was REGENERATED (234 lines, user-render only) rather than deleted — the surviving byte-fixture test needed it. SYSTEM+"\n\n"+USER reconstructs each original prompt byte-for-byte (JUDGE 7655ch, AUDIT 4312ch, REFINE 2225ch). Gates: pytest 970 passed/3 expected skips; Linux docker ty all-clear; docs untouched (modules not in the curated reference). WF-A is now fully closed: items 2+4 shipped, item 3 pending the operator's cap confirmation, item 1 on the backlog (73b8deb2).
